Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants (ending with Payment Handled)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to the subsequent Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in re-submitted cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION versus when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants without any rejection versus variants with at least one rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR compared to time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that eventually lead to Payment Handled versus cases that end in rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that bypass pre-approval steps
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after Request Payment appears in erroneous traces (to detect anomalies)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include a prior Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by org:resource
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of org:resource

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE (resubmission) and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in loops involving PRE_APPROVER rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from the last rejection event to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases originally rejected by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'
